sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51355" key="i)sxuro/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσχῡρό-πους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n51355.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strong-footed</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χαλκόποδας</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
